name: RABBIT-FEATURE-BACKLOG-2
title: Add rabbit-feature-new skill for feature scaffolding (currently lives as rabbit-cage's new-feature.py)
description:
Move feature scaffolding ownership from rabbit-cage to rabbit-feature.

Create new skill rabbit-feature-new at .claude/features/rabbit-feature/skills/rabbit-feature-new/SKILL.md. Skill takes a feature name and creates the scaffold:
- feature.json with required fields
- docs/spec/spec.md template
- docs/spec/contract.md template
- test/ with run.py
- Validates via contract.lib.checks.validate_feature

IMPLEMENTATION: ideally factor the script logic out of rabbit-cage/scripts/new-feature.py into a callable function the skill invokes. For this cycle, the skill can shell out to new-feature.py (with rabbit-cage as a temporary dependency); a follow-up cycle removes new-feature.py from rabbit-cage entirely.

Update rabbit-feature feature.json surface.skills + contract.md provides.skills. Add e2e test that the skill scaffolds a working feature.

NOTE: this cycle ADDS the skill. A LATER cycle removes new-feature.py from rabbit-cage.
